title: codereview pass 2: rpl DAO-ACK in C messages/routing
description: Added lichen_rpl_dao_ack struct, parse/write in messages.c/h. Updated process_dao to build ACK if ack_requested (status=0). handle_frame_rpl equivalent in C tests updated. Parallel explored Zephyr/tests/schc and meshtastic tests. 3 passes required before close.
